name: SHORT EXPIRY - CLEARANCE: Reflex Dog Treats - Chew Strips with Beef 200g (20 strips)
description: Reflex Dog Treats - Chew Strips with Beef , Reward good behaviour with these fun and delicious treats made with the highest quality ingredients and bursting with flavour. Pack of 20 chew strips. INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal derivatives (20% beef meat), cereals, derivatives of vegetable origin (0,4% Inulin), oils and fats, minerals. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 30 Oil Content (%) - 8 Crude Ash (%) - 8 Crude Fiber (%) - 2 Moisture Content (%) - 22.5 Vitamin A - 5,000 IE Vitamin D3 - 500 IU Vitamin E - 30 mg Zinc (as Zinc sulphate, Monohydrate) - 50 mg Copper (Copper II Sulphate, Pentahydrate) - 12 mg FEEDING RECOMMENDATIONS: Feed as a snack or treat between meals. This product does not replace full-dog food daily. Once open, keep package tightly closed. Store in a cool, dry place.
